Uses of Package
com.fincredit.model

Packages that use com.fincredit.model
Package
Description
com.fincredit.interfaces
 
com.fincredit.logic
 
com.fincredit.model
 
com.fincredit.persistence
 
com.fincredit.registry
 
  • Classes in com.fincredit.model used by com.fincredit.interfaces
    Class
    Description
    AmortizationRow
    The AmortizationRow class represents a single row in an amortization table, containing details about the payment for a specific period, including the total payment, interest portion, capital payment, and remaining balance.
    Client
    Class representing a client in the financial system, extending the Person class and including financial attributes such as monthly income and expenses.
    EvaluationResult
    Class representing the result of a loan evaluation, including approval status, monthly payment, maximum payment capacity, payment ratio, reason for decision, and evaluator's name.
  • Classes in com.fincredit.model used by com.fincredit.logic
    Class
    Description
    Client
    Class representing a client in the financial system, extending the Person class and including financial attributes such as monthly income and expenses.
    EvaluationResult
    Class representing the result of a loan evaluation, including approval status, monthly payment, maximum payment capacity, payment ratio, reason for decision, and evaluator's name.
    LoanProduct
    Abstract class representing a loan product, implementing the ILoanable interface and providing common functionality for calculating monthly payments and generating amortization tables.
  • Classes in com.fincredit.model used by com.fincredit.model
    Class
    Description
    AmortizationRow
    The AmortizationRow class represents a single row in an amortization table, containing details about the payment for a specific period, including the total payment, interest portion, capital payment, and remaining balance.
    EvaluationResult
    Class representing the result of a loan evaluation, including approval status, monthly payment, maximum payment capacity, payment ratio, reason for decision, and evaluator's name.
    Loan.Status
     
    LoanProduct
    Abstract class representing a loan product, implementing the ILoanable interface and providing common functionality for calculating monthly payments and generating amortization tables.
    Person
    Abstract class representing a person in the financial system, serving as a base for specific roles like clients and employees.
  • Classes in com.fincredit.model used by com.fincredit.persistence
    Class
    Description
    Client
    Class representing a client in the financial system, extending the Person class and including financial attributes such as monthly income and expenses.
    Loan
    Class representing a loan application, including details such as client ID, loan product, principal amount, terms, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization table, status, and evaluation result.
  • Classes in com.fincredit.model used by com.fincredit.registry
    Class
    Description
    Client
    Class representing a client in the financial system, extending the Person class and including financial attributes such as monthly income and expenses.
    Loan
    Class representing a loan application, including details such as client ID, loan product, principal amount, terms, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization table, status, and evaluation result.
